arts.ttl: 'Amorim can produce another masterpiece at Man Utd'
arts.sum: Football writer John Duerden speaks to Portuguese manager Vitor Pereira about his compatriot Ruben Amorim's move to Manchester United. When Ruben Amorim emerges from the tunnel at Ipswich Town on Sunday, for his first game in charge of Manchester United, he will become the seventh Portuguese to manage a club in the Premier League.

arts.ttl: Man United head coach Ruben Amorim discusses his plans for the misfiring Marcus Rashford
arts.sum: Manchester United head coach Ruben Amorim hints that English forward Marcus Rashford will have an important role to play under him.

arts.ttl: Ruben Amorim ready to unleash his very own Ryan Gravenberch at Manchester United
arts.sum: Mason Mount was signed by Erik ten Hag for a transfer fee potentially rising to £60m after Man Utd previously flirted with a move for now-Liverpool star Ryan Gravenberch.

arts.ttl: Man Utd target January midfield transfer despite Amorim 'love' for forgotten star
arts.sum: The Portuguese boss was complimentary of Mason Mount in the build-up to the game but Sky Sport Germany reporter Florian Plettenberg has claimed that United could still target another midfielder in January. Manchester United have already begun transfer plans under Ruben Amorim with reports that a midfielder could be targeted in January.

arts.ttl: Man United head coach Ruben Amorim calls 25-year-old "perfect" for his new system at Old Trafford
arts.sum: Manchester United head coach Ruben Amorim suggests that Mason Mount will be an important player for him at Old Trafford.

arts.ttl: I believe in myself and the club - Man Utd head coach Amorim
arts.sum: Ruben Amorim says "I believe in myself and I believe in the club" in his firstnews conference since taking over as Manchester United head coach.

arts.ttl: How Man Utd managers fared in their first Premier League games
arts.sum: As Ruben Amorim prepares for his first match in charge, we look back at the Premier League debuts for all Man Utd's permanent managers since Sir Alex Ferguson retired.

arts.ttl: Was new Man Utd boss Amorim always destined for success?
arts.sum: BBC Sport speaks to some of those closest to Ruben Amorim to delve into his character and discover what the new Manchester United boss will bring to Old Trafford.

arts.ttl: Ruben Amorim theory emerges after Man United comments as brutal Erik ten Hag jibe sent
arts.sum: Ruben Amorim has attracted praise for his first press conference as Manchester United head coach and ex-striker Michael Owen is among them.

arts.ttl: Man United guaranteed to be without seven stars vs Ipswich as Ruben Amorim blow confirmed
arts.sum: Manchester United injury news with Ruben Amorim set to be without a host of key players as he gets to work against Ipswich Town
